requirement_topic.en: Market Access Through INNOQ National Conformity and Import Inspection
requirement_topic.zh: 通过 INNOQ 国家符合性与进口检验的市场准入
requirement_topic.zht: 通過 INNOQ 國家符合性與進口檢驗的市場准入

summary.en: INNOQ is the Mozambique national standardization and quality body that sets NM standards （adopting IEC where relevant） and underpins conformity and import-inspection requirements. Power tools placed on the Mozambique market generally need conformity evidence mapped to the adopted NM/IEC 62841 basis, an import-inspection clearance, and Portuguese-language product documentation. Main entry ports include Maputo, Beira, and Nacala.
summary.zh: INNOQ 是莫桑比克国家标准化和质量机构，制定 NM 标准（相关时采纳 IEC），并支撑符合性和进口检验要求。投放莫桑比克市场的电动工具通常需要映射到采纳的 NM/IEC 62841 基础的符合性证据、进口检验放行以及葡萄牙语产品文件。主要入境口岸包括马普托、贝拉和纳卡拉。
summary.zht: INNOQ 是莫三比克國家標準化和品質機構，制定 NM 標準（相關時採納 IEC），並支撐符合性和進口檢驗要求。投放莫三比克市場的電動工具通常需要映射到採納的 NM/IEC 62841 基礎的符合性證據、進口檢驗放行以及葡萄牙語產品文件。主要入境口岸包括馬普托、貝拉和納卡拉。

standards_or_laws: INNOQ national conformity and standardization framework （NM standards adopting IEC）
Mozambique import-inspection requirements at ports such as Maputo, Beira, Nacala
Portuguese-language documentation requirement for the local market

summary.en: China power-tool files commonly rely on the GB/T 3883 series and, where applicable, CCC for the domestic market. These provide a technical basis but do not constitute Mozambique conformity, import-inspection clearance, or Portuguese documentation, all of which attach when the product is placed on the Mozambique market.
summary.zh: 中国电动工具文件通常依赖 GB/T 3883 系列，并在适用时依赖 CCC 用于国内市场。这些提供技术基础，但不构成莫桑比克符合性、进口检验放行或葡萄牙语文件，而后者在产品投放莫桑比克市场时才适用。
summary.zht: 中國電動工具文件通常依賴 GB/T 3883 系列，並在適用時依賴 CCC 用於國內市場。這些提供技術基礎，但不構成莫三比克符合性、進口檢驗放行或葡萄牙語文件，而後者在產品投放莫三比克市場時才適用。

gap.en: A China domestic safety report is not enough for Mozambique placement. The importer needs INNOQ-aligned conformity evidence mapped to the adopted NM reference, import-inspection clearance at the port of entry, and Portuguese-language instructions, safety information, and markings. The exact procedure and any pre-shipment verification should be confirmed with INNOQ and the appointed inspection body.
gap.zh: 中国国内安全报告不足以支持投放莫桑比克市场。进口商需要映射到采纳 NM 引用的 INNOQ 一致性证据、入境口岸的进口检验放行，以及葡萄牙语说明书、安全信息和标识。具体程序及任何装运前核验应与 INNOQ 和指定检验机构确认。
gap.zht: 中國國內安全報告不足以支援投放莫三比克市場。進口商需要映射到採納 NM 引用的 INNOQ 一致性證據、入境口岸的進口檢驗放行，以及葡萄牙語說明書、安全資訊和標識。具體程序及任何裝運前核驗應與 INNOQ 和指定檢驗機構確認。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice: INNOQ national conformity, import inspection at the port of entry, and Portuguese-language documentation for power tools placed on the Mozambique market.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory China domestic baseline commonly uses the GB/T 3883 series, with CCC where applicable.

source.publisher: INNOQ - Instituto Nacional de Normalizacao e Qualidade （Mozambique）

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Not Mozambique-ready as-is if the product file only contains GB/T 3883 or CCC evidence. INNOQ-aligned conformity mapped to the adopted NM reference, import-inspection clearance, and Portuguese-language documentation are required before placement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 若产品文件仅包含 GB/T 3883 或 CCC 证据，则现状不能视为莫桑比克就绪。投放前需要映射到采纳 NM 引用的 INNOQ 一致性、进口检验放行以及葡萄牙语文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 若產品文件僅包含 GB/T 3883 或 CCC 證據，則現狀不能視為莫三比克就緒。投放前需要映射到採納 NM 引用的 INNOQ 一致性、進口檢驗放行以及葡萄牙語文件。
